title: Proclamation No. 431, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 431

ESTABLISHING AS BIGBIGA SPRING FOREST RESERVE FOR WATERSHED PROTECTION AND TIMBER PRODUCTION A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NARVACAN, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Director of Forestry, approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section eighteen hundred and twenty-six of Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and eleven, known, as the Revised Administrative Code, I, Manuel L. Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby establish for watershed, protection and timber production the Bigbiga Spring. Forest Reserve and place it under the administration and control of the Bureau of Forestry, which shall have the authority to regulate the use and occupancy of this reserve and the cutting, collection, and removal of timber and other forest products therein in accordance with the Forest Law and Regulations.

I, therefore, withdraw from entry, sale, or settlement, and hereby declare and proclaim to be the Bigbiga Spring Forest Reserve, subject to private rights if any there be, that portion of the public domain situated in the municipality of Narvacan, Province of Ilocos Sur, Island of Luzon, and described in the Bureau of Forestry map No. F. R. 92, to wit:

Beginning at corner 1, a lanete tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2019/118, identical to corner 45, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15, which is S. 82° W., 1,490 meters, more or less, from barrio Cadacad, Navacan, Ilocos Sur; thence following a trail in south-southwesterly directioin about 440 meters to corner 2, a banaba tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/7, identical to corner 44, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 67° W., 260 meters to corner 3, a balingv hasai tree, 20 ran. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/12, identical to corner 43, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 43° W., 410 meters to cornel’ 4, a narra tree, 35 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/19, identical to corner 42, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 64° W., 260 meters to corner 5, an. Alem tree, 20 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/24, identical to corner 41, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 53° W., 170 meters to corner 6, a bani tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/29, identical to corner 40, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 88° W., 180 meters to corner 7, a duhat tree, 40 cm. in diameter, maked T. L. 202.0/33, identical corner 39, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 22° E., 170 meters to corner 8, a lanete tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/44, identical to corner 38, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 11° W., 270 meters to corner 9, a bitnong tree, 45 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/49, identical to corner 47, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 31° E., 60 meters to corner 10, a point, intersection of lines of P. Z. Bigbiga Spring Reservation; thence N. 73° 24′ E., 12.65 meters to corner 11, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation,, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 46° 57′ W., 18 meters to corner 12, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 75° 45′ W., 16.20 meters to corner 13, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 63° 15′ W., 18.60 meters to corner 14, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 52° W., 16.70 meters to corner 15, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 28° 31′ W., 16.75 meters to corner 16, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 47° 25′ W., 11.75 meters to corner 17, a point, identical to a corner of Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence S. 73° 04′ W., 21.50 meteis to corner 18, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 13° 19′ W., 79.88 meters to corner 19, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 9° 34′ E., 41.50 meters to corner 20, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 73° 11′ E., 28 meters to corner 21, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 85° 16′ E., 15.12 meters to corner 22, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 87° 10′ E., 14.20 meters to corner 23, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 78° 21′ E., 15.35 meters to corner 24, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 68° 27′ E., 20.40 meters to corner 25, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 82° 30′ E., 26.70 meters to corner 26, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 79’° 42′ E., 26.50 meters to corner 27, a point, identical to a corner of proposed Bigbiga Spring Reservation, Bureau of Public Works; thence N. 86° 04′ E., 15.10 meters to corner 28, a balinghasai tree, 30 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2020/53, identical to corner 36, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 4° E., 510 meters to corner 29, a B. L. cylindrical monument, 15 by 60 cm., identical to corner 35, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 66° 58′ E., 178.14 meters to corner 30, a B. L. cylindrical monument, 15 by 60 cm., identical to corner 34, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 20° 46′ E., 670.80 meters to corner 31, a cross on stone monument, 20 by 20 by 40 cm., identical to corner 33, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 11° 59′ E., 545.43 meters to corner 32, a cross on stone monument, 40 by 40 by 40 cm., identical to corner 32, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence N. 84° E., 240 meters to corner 33, a bio tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2049/94, identical to corner 51, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 2° W., 160 meters to corner 34, a makaasim tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2049/96, identical to corner 50, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 11° E., 250 meters to corner 35, a lanete tree, 40 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2049/99, identical to corner 49, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 22° E., 330 meters to corner 36, a binayuyu tree, 35 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2049/108, identical to corner 48, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 8° E., 210 meters to corner 37, a himbabao tree, 30 cm., in diameter, marked T. L. 2049/111, identical to corner 47, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 6° E., 200 meters to corner 38, a bio tree, 35 cm. in diameter, marked T. L. 2049/115, identical to corner 46, block I, alienable and disposable Ilocos Sur project 15; thence S. 71° E., 140 meters to corner 1, the point of beginning.

Corners 1 to 9, 28 and 33 to 38 were marked with B. F. hatchet No. 469.

This forest reserve contains an area of 135 hectares.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the city of Manila, this sixteenth day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-nine, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fourth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
